title: arenaria stricta subsp. texana
intro: Arenaria stricta subsp. texana, also known as sandwort, is a low-growing, perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can aid in wound healing and skin conditions. The health benefits of Arenaria stricta subsp. texana include reducing inflammation and promoting the healing of skin irritations, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties that can protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used topically to apply directly to affected skin areas.
